title: Minimal Agent SDK: run a task in 10 lines

body.goal: Run an autonomous agent that can read, edit, and execute code using the Claude Agent SDK (Python).
steps: Call `query(prompt='your task', options=ClaudeAgentOptions(allowed_tools=['Read', 'Edit', 'Bash']))` — this returns an async iterator.
Use `async for message in query(...)` to stream each message Claude produces as it works.
Claude autonomously reads files, reasons, edits code, and runs commands — you just consume the streamed output.
